title: Field Engineer app
excerpt: Hi Guys, im looking for a field engineer app using monday.com, so we are a delivery company that uses monday.com to book our jobs and keep all our customers on. we need a way of using it as a field engineer app. I would …

posts.author: Lewistaylor (Lewis Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Guys, im looking for a field engineer app using monday.com, so we are a delivery company that uses monday.com to book our jobs and keep all our customers on. we need a way of using it as a field engineer app. I would lobe to use work forms but this doesnt work as you cant prefill information, Does anyone know of a solution?

posts.author: MASO (Markus @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Lewistaylor

Welcome to the community

We are working on an app that will make it possible to create these kind of client portals. You can learn more about the upcoming solution here: Client Portal for monday.com

Feel free to drop me a line at markus@getgorilla.app if you want to have a chat.

– Markus

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Lewistaylor

We just officially launched URL Parameters in our monday form builder Easyform, check out our community post here.
